name: Flickering Standard
specialty: Specializes in extinguishing rifts before they can tear apart the city, employing a unique blend of arcane knowledge and physical prowess.

members.name: Zephyra Vosk
members.note: Her eyes glow with a soft, flickering light, a constant reminder of her time spent within the rifts.

members.name: Gavrik Ironfist
members.note: His left arm is a mechanical replacement, a gruesome testament to a past battle with a rift creature.

members.name: Lysandra Stonefoot
members.note: She moves with a silent grace, her ears attuned to the heartbeat of the city, making her an invaluable asset in the Undercity.

visual: Clad in black cloaks, they carry shields adorned with a symbol of a flickering flame. Their faces are covered by masks, only their eyes visible, reflecting the dim light of the Undercity.
reputation_note: The Flickering Standard is feared for their skill and determination, yet whispered about for their mysterious connection to the rifts.
